mano_cua.result_summary: Nuxt+Ionic应用正常运行。19种ion-*自定义元素正确渲染（ion-app/page/content/header/tabs等），4个Tab路由均可访问，Console无错误（仅Vue Suspense实验性警告），Vite HMR正常连接，全局中间件正常运行。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All Ionic components rendered correctly, routing works across 4 tabs, no console errors.

deploy_notes.workaround: Node 18 too old (styleText missing), switched to Node 22. Used frozen lockfile to avoid dependency resolution issues.
